chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 143 / 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING / PRIORITY 1) For hearing of main case. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 1063/2023. 12.03.2025. Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, Advocate for Applicant. ______________ On the last date of hearing, following order was passed:- “As per bailiff’s report, notice could not be served upon Respondent as the address is incomplete; whereas, on perusal of the record, it reflects that the matter pertains to appropriate classification of the goods and ordinarily we had referred the matters to the Classification Committee; but the Order-in-Original in question reflects that the classification has already been decided by the Classification Committee vide Order No./KAPE-DC(PICT)/2016 dated 18.05.2016. While confronted, Counsel needs time to place on record the said decision for our assistance. At his request time is allowed. Adjourned to 12.03.2025.” Today, Counsel under instructions submits that the department is not in possession of the decision given by the Classification Committee vide order dated 18.05.2016, whereas, in the order-in-original the Adjudicating Authority has placed reliance on such decision. We are surprised with such response from the Applicant department. Be that as it may, since compliance has not been made, therefore, this Reference Application is dismissed for non prosecution. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/

Be that as it may, since compliance has not been made, therefore, this Reference Application is dismissed for non prosecution. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/ ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 143 / 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on CMA No. 1062/2023. 2) For hearing of main case. 3) For orders on CMA No. 1063/2023. 21.08.2023. Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, Advocate for Applicant. ______________ 1) Granted. 2 & 3) Notice to Respondent on the proposed Questions of Law for a date to be fixed by the office. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
